scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const files=fs.readdirSync('./data').filter(f=>f.endsWith('.json')); const mtimes=files.map(f=>fs.statSync('./data/'+f).mtime.getTime()); const dataDate=files.length ? new Date(Math.max(...mtimes)).toISOString() : null; fs.writeFileSync('./public/version.json', JSON.stringify({ buildDate: new Date().toISOString(), dataDate }));" && vite build && cp -r data dist/
